news.title:
IndusInd Bank sees 12.1% rise in open interest despite weak stock momentum.
Rising volumes and price decline indicate evolving market positioning by traders.
news.summary:
IndusInd Bank sees 12.1% rise in open interest despite weak stock momentum.
Rising volumes and price decline indicate evolving market positioning by traders.

news.title:
IndusInd Bank held an analyst/investor meet on March 12, 2026, in Mumbai.
No sensitive information was shared; presentation is available on IndusInd's website.
news.summary:
IndusInd Bank held an analyst/investor meet on March 12, 2026, in Mumbai.
No sensitive information was shared; presentation is available on IndusInd's website.

news.title:
SAT rejects Arun Khurana's plea to access SEBI's 1.7TB data in IndusInd insider trading case.
IndusInd Bank's stock fell 33% post accounting lapses, now up 2% since March; closed 2% lower at ₹917 on BSE.
news.summary:
SAT rejects Arun Khurana's plea to access SEBI's 1.7TB data in IndusInd insider trading case.
IndusInd Bank's stock fell 33% post accounting lapses, now up 2% since March; closed 2% lower at ₹917 on BSE.

news.title:
SEBI collected 1.7 TB of emails for insider trading probe into IndusInd Bank.
SAT denied former Deputy CEO's request for access to investigation materials.
news.summary:
SEBI collected 1.7 TB of emails for insider trading probe into IndusInd Bank.
SAT denied former Deputy CEO's request for access to investigation materials.

news.title:
IndusInd Bank witnessed a block trade of ~630,725 shares at ₹950.4.
The total transaction value of the trade stood at ₹59.94 crores.
news.summary:
IndusInd Bank witnessed a block trade of ~630,725 shares at ₹950.4.
The total transaction value of the trade stood at ₹59.94 crores.

news.title:
IndusInd Bank CEO aims to rejuvenate growth with a new team setup.
Changes in assurance and business teams to be completed by March 31.
news.summary:
IndusInd Bank CEO aims to rejuvenate growth with a new team setup.
Changes in assurance and business teams to be completed by March 31.

news.title:
IndusInd Bank hosted an investor meet on Feb 23, 2026, in Mumbai.
No unpublished price-sensitive info was shared; details are on the bank's website.
news.summary:
IndusInd Bank hosted an investor meet on Feb 23, 2026, in Mumbai.
No unpublished price-sensitive info was shared; details are on the bank's website.

news.title:
PSBs surpass private banks as quarterly profits reach new highs.
Only 3 of 30 listed universal banks had >1% net NPAs in Q3.
news.summary:
PSBs surpass private banks as quarterly profits reach new highs.
Only 3 of 30 listed universal banks had >1% net NPAs in Q3.

news.title:
Emkay Global upgrades IndusInd Bank to 'Buy' with a target price of ₹1,100, implying a 17% upside.
The bank's RoA is projected to improve to 1.3-1.5% by FY28-29, supported by better asset quality and efficiency.
news.summary:
Emkay Global upgrades IndusInd Bank to 'Buy' with a target price of ₹1,100, implying a 17% upside.
The bank's RoA is projected to improve to 1.3-1.5% by FY28-29, supported by better asset quality and efficiency.

news.title:
IndusInd Bank saw a block trade of ~551,938 shares at Rs. 925.85.
The total transaction value of the trade was Rs. 51.1 crores.
news.summary:
IndusInd Bank saw a block trade of ~551,938 shares at Rs. 925.85.
The total transaction value of the trade was Rs. 51.1 crores.

news.title:
IndusInd Bank announced an analyst/investor meet scheduled for February 23, 2026.
The event, part of Kotak's 'Chasing Growth 2026,' will be held physically in Mumbai.
news.summary:
IndusInd Bank announced an analyst/investor meet scheduled for February 23, 2026.
The event, part of Kotak's 'Chasing Growth 2026,' will be held physically in Mumbai.

news.title:
Bank Nifty fell below 60,000 post RBI's unchanged repo rate at 5.25%. IndusInd, PNB led losses.
Axis, ICICI, and Kotak Bank gained; key support for Bank Nifty is 59,800 with resistance at 60,300-60,400.
news.summary:
Bank Nifty fell below 60,000 post RBI's unchanged repo rate at 5.25%. IndusInd, PNB led losses.
Axis, ICICI, and Kotak Bank gained; key support for Bank Nifty is 59,800 with resistance at 60,300-60,400.

news.title:
Nifty Bank dropped nearly 400 points post-RBI policy announcement.
IndusInd Bank, PNB, and Bank of Baroda fell around 2% each.
news.summary:
Nifty Bank dropped nearly 400 points post-RBI policy announcement.
IndusInd Bank, PNB, and Bank of Baroda fell around 2% each.

news.title:
IndusInd Bank shared its Q3 FY26 earnings call transcript from Jan 23, 2026.
The transcript covers standalone and consolidated unaudited financial results for Q3 and 9 months.
news.summary:
IndusInd Bank shared its Q3 FY26 earnings call transcript from Jan 23, 2026.
The transcript covers standalone and consolidated unaudited financial results for Q3 and 9 months.

news.title:
IndusInd Bank appoints Ravi Pangal as Chief Information Officer effective January 28, 2026.
Pangal brings extensive experience from HSBC, Standard Chartered, ANZ Bank, and Wipro Systems.
news.summary:
IndusInd Bank appoints Ravi Pangal as Chief Information Officer effective January 28, 2026.
Pangal brings extensive experience from HSBC, Standard Chartered, ANZ Bank, and Wipro Systems.

news.title:
RBI fined IndusInd Bank Rs 2.03 lakh for soiled note remittance discrepancies.
Discrepancies were found in notes remitted on 30 Sept 2025 as per RBI's guidelines.
news.summary:
RBI fined IndusInd Bank Rs 2.03 lakh for soiled note remittance discrepancies.
Discrepancies were found in notes remitted on 30 Sept 2025 as per RBI's guidelines.

news.title:
Large private banks like Kotak Mahindra Bank and HDFC Bank report slower growth (9-12%), while PSU banks gain market share, with Indian Bank and others showing strong performance.
NBFCs like Muthoot Finance and Fedfina excel in gold loans; IndusInd Bank stabilizes; SBI outperforms but growth aligns with sector at 11-12%.
news.summary:
Large private banks like Kotak Mahindra Bank and HDFC Bank report slower growth (9-12%), while PSU banks gain market share, with Indian Bank and others showing strong performance.
NBFCs like Muthoot Finance and Fedfina excel in gold loans; IndusInd Bank stabilizes; SBI outperforms but growth aligns with sector at 11-12%.

news.title:
Axis Bank led Q3FY26 growth in profits, while IndusInd lagged.
HDFC and ICICI ensured stability; Kotak Mahindra excelled in margins, asset quality.
news.summary:
Axis Bank led Q3FY26 growth in profits, while IndusInd lagged.
HDFC and ICICI ensured stability; Kotak Mahindra excelled in margins, asset quality.

news.title:
Elara Capital downgrades IndusInd Bank to Reduce but raises target price to ₹910.
The target price increase is from ₹720 to ₹910.
news.summary:
Elara Capital downgrades IndusInd Bank to Reduce but raises target price to ₹910.
The target price increase is from ₹720 to ₹910.

news.title:
IndusInd Bank reports stable asset quality trends across core businesses.
Microfinance sector shows early recovery signs, indicating potential improvement.
news.summary:
IndusInd Bank reports stable asset quality trends across core businesses.
Microfinance sector shows early recovery signs, indicating potential improvement.
